title: Hana Saku Heya, Hirusagari no Tsubomi
original_title: 花咲く部屋、昼下がりの蕾
overview: A story of love and sensuality, directed by the genius Hideo Jojo, starring the sexy actress Yui Hatano. It depicts the sad and beautiful love of a beautiful florist woman who often draws in strangers and is involved with her and her husband who secretly watches over it.
